# Back pain cleaner — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A visually stunning marketing website for a back pain relief product, featuring AI-generated models showcasing the product in use. The brand aims to combine aesthetic appeal with health-focused messaging, using modern AI imagery to create a professional and trustworthy look that resonates with people suffering from back pain.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://back-pain-cleaner-616f8307.zappy5.app
גלו את הפתרון המהפכני לשיכוך כאבי גב המשלב עיצוב ויזואלי עוצר נשימה עם יעילות מוכחת. דגמי AI מציגים את המוצר בפעולה אמיתית. התחילו לחיות ללא כאב עוד היום!

### Contact form

- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Back pain cleaner
A visually stunning marketing website for a back pain relief product, featuring AI-generated models showcasing the product in use. The brand aims to combine aesthetic appeal with health-focused messaging, using modern AI imagery to create a professional and trustworthy look that resonates with people suffering from back pain.

## Target Audience
- אנשים הסובלים מכאבי גב
- עובדי משרד
- גמלאים

## Industry
Health & Wellness
